name: resolve_handle
description: Resolve a Bluesky handle to a DID. Returns the DID for a handle (alice.bsky.social → did:plc:xxx). For reverse (DID → handle), use get_profile.

name: get_record
description: Get a raw AT Protocol record by its full AT URI. Supports any record type — posts, likes, follows, lists, etc. For browsing all records of a type, use list_records.

name: list_records
description: List records in a repository collection. Enumerate all records of a given type for a user. Supports cursor pagination. Repo accepts handle or DID.

name: search_posts
description: Search for posts on Bluesky by keyword. Supports sort (top/latest), Lucene syntax, and cursor pagination.

name: get_timeline
description: Get the authenticated user's home timeline — posts from people they follow. Supports cursor pagination.

name: get_author_feed
description: Get a user's post feed. Actor accepts handle, DID, or 'me' for current user. Supports cursor pagination.

name: get_popular_feed_generators
description: Get popular/trending feed generators on Bluesky. Returns name, description, creator, AT URI.

name: get_feed_generator
description: Get detailed info about a specific feed generator by its AT URI.

name: get_feed
description: Get posts from a specific feed generator. Use the AT URI from get_feed_generator or get_popular_feed_generators. Supports cursor pagination.

name: get_post_thread
description: Get a post thread. Supports format='flat' (human-readable, default), 'tree' (raw AT Protocol), or 'subtree' (expand folded replies).

name: get_post_context
description: Get comprehensive context for a post: ancestors, replies, media summary, reply status.

name: get_post_interactions
description: Get users who interacted with a post. Type='likes' (default) or 'reposts'. Supports cursor pagination.

name: get_quotes
description: Find posts that quote a specific AT URI. Supports cursor pagination.

name: search_actors
description: Search for users on Bluesky by name, handle, or keyword. Supports cursor pagination.

name: get_profile
description: Get a user's profile by DID or handle. Use actor='me' for current user. Returns full profile with counts.

name: get_connections
description: Get a user's social connections. Direction='following' (default) or 'followers'. Actor accepts handle, DID, or 'me'. Supports cursor pagination.

name: get_suggested_follows
description: Get suggested follows (recommended users) for a user. Actor accepts handle, DID, or 'me'.

name: list_notifications
description: Get notifications for the authenticated user. Returns reason, author, timestamp, read status. Supports cursor pagination.

name: extract_images_from_post
description: Extract image blob references (DID + CID) from a Bluesky post. Use the results with download_image or view_image.

name: download_image
description: Download a Bluesky post image to local Downloads folder (Node.js) or return as data URL (PWA/browser).

name: view_image
description: View and analyze a Bluesky post image. For vision models only. Use did+cid for post images or uploadIndex for chat-uploaded images.

name: extract_external_link
description: Extract the external link embed (link card) from a post. Returns URL, title, description.

name: fetch_web_markdown
description: Fetch an external web page as clean markdown via r.jina.ai proxy. Use to read articles and links.

name: search_web_ddg
description: Web search via DuckDuckGo (no API key needed). Returns web results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

name: search_wikipedia
description: Search Wikipedia and return a summary of the top matching article. Supports language parameter (default 'en').

name: create_post
description: Create a new post, reply, or quote with optional images. Requires user confirmation.

name: like
description: Like a post. Requires user confirmation.

name: repost
description: Repost a post. Requires user confirmation.

name: follow
description: Follow a user. Subject accepts handle or DID. Requires user confirmation.

name: get_lists
description: Get all lists created by a user. Actor accepts handle, DID, 'me', or leave empty for current user. Returns name, purpose, member count, description.

name: get_list_feed
description: Get recent posts from members of a specific list. Supports cursor pagination.

name: create_list
description: Create a new user list. Purpose='curated' or 'moderation'. Requires user confirmation.

name: edit_list_members
description: Add a user to or remove a user from a list. Action='add' (default) or 'remove'. Subject accepts handle or DID. Requires user confirmation.
